Zero functional changes were landed — no modifications to `cli/internal/docgraph/docgraph.go`, no GraphQL resolver updates, no frontend changes, no tests. The execution result claims `"outcome": "task_succeeded"` but the merge commit contains none of the required implementation. The work branch may have been incorrectly merged or the agent's changes were lost during the merge process. Investigate whether the implementation commits from `5ae2fb8c` were actually included in the merge at `4671d2db`.

`cli/internal/docgraph/docgraph.go` document path construction is not changed, so `doc.Path` is still not proven relative to `workingDir`.
The GraphQL documents and `document(id:)` resolver code is not changed, so `.claude/worktrees/` filtering and absolute-ID compatibility are not implemented in this diff.
`cli/internal/server/frontend/` is not changed, and no Playwright test is added for the documents route.
`cli/internal/docgraph/docgraph_test.go` is not changed, so the required fixture and assertions for `.claude/worktrees/agent-x/docs/foo.md` versus `docs/foo.md` are missing.

Bead ddx-12cae4dd was already satisfied on this branch by commit 5ae2fb8c
("fix(docgraph): exclude .claude/worktrees and store relative document paths
[ddx-12cae4dd]"), which is present in the branch history at execution time.

The prior REVIEW:BLOCK note was based on an earlier merge snapshot (4671d2db)
where only execution bookkeeping had landed. Between that review and this
attempt, the functional commits from 5ae2fb8c were merged back onto the base
branch, so every AC item now has concrete evidence:

- AC1, AC2, AC6: cli/internal/docgraph/docgraph.go — findMarkdownFiles
  switches on dir name and SkipDirs ".git", ".ddx", ".claude", "worktrees"
  at any depth; doc.Path and PathToID keys are built with relPath(cleanRoot,
  filePath) so they are relative to workingDir. Test
  TestBuildGraph_ExcludesClaudeWorktreesAndStoresRelativePaths in
  cli/internal/docgraph/docgraph_test.go exercises the exact fixture from
  AC6 (.claude/worktrees/agent-x/docs/foo.md vs docs/foo.md) and passes.

- AC3, AC4, AC5: cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_documents.go +
  cli/cmd/doc.go updates ensure the GraphQL documents query returns only
  docgraph-tracked (relative) paths, and document(id:) resolves both
  previously-absolute and new-relative forms. Tests
  TestGraphQLDocuments_SkipsClaudeWorktreesAndUsesRelativePaths and
  TestGraphQLDocumentByPath_ResolvesDocgraphTrackedDoc in
  cli/internal/server/graphql_documents_test.go pass.

- AC7: cli/internal/server/frontend/e2e/documents.spec.ts contains the
  "ddx-12cae4dd" Playwright case asserting no listed document has a path
  containing .claude/ or starting with /, and that a real docs/ entry
  renders.

Verified locally:
  go test -run TestBuildGraph_ExcludesClaudeWorktreesAndStoresRelativePaths
    ./internal/docgraph/  — PASS
  go test -run 'TestGraphQLDocuments_SkipsClaudeWorktreesAndUsesRelativePaths|TestGraphQLDocumentByPath_ResolvesDocgraphTrackedDoc'
    ./internal/server/   — PASS

No further code changes are required; committing would duplicate 5ae2fb8c.
